opportunities.title: Funnel truth — stop mis-diagnosing the binding leak (awareness scored as healthiest while dead)
opportunities.problem: weakestStage() ranks awareness HEALTHIEST at url_submitted_per_page_view=54800% (3288 human-sourced urls / 6 page_views) and blames 'Visit->preview 0%'. Preview is downstream noise of a dead top-of-funnel (6 human page_views/7d). Four preview loops shipped this month all fire ~0x because ~6 humans reach them.
opportunities.hypothesis: Scoring awareness as BLIND when page_view<20/7d or url:pv>100%, surfacing funnel_blind_flags, and requiring session-correlated page_view before counting human url_submitted will flip weakest_stage to awareness and stop steering build effort at a phantom leak.
opportunities.baseline: weakest_stage=preview (artifact); awareness ranked healthiest at 54800%; 6 page_views/7d; ~99.9% synthetic url_submitted
opportunities.target: weakest_stage flips to awareness; funnel_blind_flags.awareness_blind=true; page_view_7d > 20 within 14d OR awareness confirmed dead -> Growth outbound becomes P0
opportunities.next_step: Ship Changes 1+2 (orchestrator-brief weakestStage + funnel_blind_flags) day one; Change 3 (session-correlated human url_submitted in funnelTelemetry.js) within the week. See spec.

opportunities.title: Close the preview->signup leak: invert the gate (value-first), wire founder signup events
opportunities.problem: 3,282 url_submitted in 7d but 0 instant_matches_viewed (real users) until 2026-06-28 ship; founder_signup_started=2, completed=0; preview_view_per_url=0%.
opportunities.hypothesis: Server+client instant_matches_viewed logging + evidence strip + gated save/intro converts >=25% of preview viewers to signup-started.
opportunities.next_step: Monitor post-ship instant_matches_viewed (24h verify) + preview_evidence_strip_viewed; optimize gate CTA if signup_started flat.

opportunities.title: Funnel event observability + preview_requested capture
opportunities.problem: User-side funnel was blind; could not distinguish no-traffic from no-logging.
opportunities.hypothesis: Automated heartbeat + server-side preview logging on preview load (not submit) enables agent optimization.
opportunities.next_step: founder_demand 1,221 events/7d; preview_requested now fires on preview load only. Hand corpus to investor_dealflow_digest.

opportunities.title: Match engagement API + UI events
opportunities.problem: 31 match_viewed in 7d but 0 match_intro_requested — post-preview activation is dead.
opportunities.hypothesis: Instrumenting view → intro → contact will reveal where founders drop off and unlock engagement experiments.
opportunities.baseline: 0% intro_per_match_view (39 views, 0 intros) — dominant preview intro CTA opened Peter panel with ZERO funnel events, so match_intro_requested was structurally blind, not truly zero.
opportunities.target: 5% intro rate on viewed matches within 30d; match_intro_requested > 0 within 7d
opportunities.next_step: SHIPPED 2026-07-15: instrument intro INTENT on Peter-panel open in InstantMatchPreview.handleGate (fires match_intro_requested + recordMatchEngagement('intro'), deduped per investor, source=instant_preview_intro_intent). Verify match_intro_requested fires in conversion:funnel within 48h; then optimize panel→concierge_submit copy.

opportunities.title: Founder match nudge service
opportunities.problem: Founders submit URL but may not return to view matches.
opportunities.hypothesis: Email/in-app nudge with top 3 investor names increases return visits 2x.
opportunities.next_step: Monitor return_visit_per_preview; trigger signal-delta nudge when preview views accrue.

opportunities.title: Investor virtual portfolio — pick 10 startups, track over time, sync to PM tools
opportunities.problem: Investors lack sticky differentiation; 1 investor signup in 7d, 0 portfolio picks.
opportunities.hypothesis: 10-pick virtual portfolio + weekly delta creates return visits; export to Smartsheet/Carta reduces spreadsheet work.
opportunities.target: 40% of investor signups add ≥1 pick in 7d; 15% return_visit_7d
opportunities.next_step: Monitor investor_email_to_profile + investor_portfolio_exported; drive picks post-signup.

opportunities.title: Weekly investor dealflow digest (MCP + email)
opportunities.problem: Investors lack a reason to log in after signup.
opportunities.hypothesis: Thesis-matched startup digest increases investor retention and intro acceptance.
opportunities.next_step: Live digest Mon 8:30 UTC; monitor open rate + investor return visits.

opportunities.title: Preview matches before signup (matches_preview variant)
opportunities.problem: URL submits fire without preview view — API traffic inflates url_submitted.
opportunities.hypothesis: 70% matches_preview traffic + preview-on-load logging closes url→preview_view leak.
opportunities.baseline: 0% preview_view_per_url (3,282 urls, 0 real preview views pre-fix)
opportunities.next_step: 14d: compare preview_view_per_url and signup vs url_first control.

opportunities.title: Reject junk names at ingest
opportunities.problem: Low-quality startup names pollute match pool and depress GOD means.
opportunities.hypothesis: Entity-resolution gate at submit reduces C-tier approved startups by 30%.
opportunities.next_step: Run npm run pipeline:god-audit; tighten correlate-policy thresholds

opportunities.title: Why this investor? — match explain blocks on preview
opportunities.problem: 31 match views, 0 intros — founders see scores but not structured evidence.
opportunities.hypothesis: Expandable 3-bullet explain blocks increase intro requests >=25%.
opportunities.target: 40% of preview viewers expand ≥1 explain; intro_per_match_view > 0
opportunities.next_step: MatchExplainBlock shipped on instant preview (top match default-open). Monitor match_explain_viewed → match_intro_requested.

opportunities.title: Habit loops — signal delta, return triggers, picky explain blocks
opportunities.problem: 4 return_visit_7d vs near-zero preview views — no habit loop yet.
opportunities.hypothesis: Signal-delta emails + match explain + gated save/intro create return visits without paid acquisition.
opportunities.target: 20% return within 7d of first preview; match_intro_rate > 0
opportunities.next_step: HALT new preview loops — funnel_truth_weakest_stage shows ~6 human page_views/7d, so shipped loops (evidence_strip=0, match_explain=0, delta=1, oracle_gap=1) are traffic-starved, not broken. Re-evaluate after awareness is instrumented + fed.

opportunities.title: Active awareness — outbound + share proof, not passive SEO
opportunities.problem: 6 page_view vs 3,282 url_submitted in 7d — almost all traffic is API/direct submit, not landing visits.
opportunities.hypothesis: Weekly outbound + hero/find-investors page_view instrumentation drives attributable url_submitted at near-zero CAC.
opportunities.next_step: ESCALATING: page_view shipped on Home/FindInvestors/Matches/Art yet only 6 fire/7d — awareness is the TRUE binding constraint (see funnel_truth_weakest_stage). Audit why page_view under-fires + Growth outbound to /find-investors becomes P0 once the diagnostic flips.

opportunities.title: Full-funnel analytics — every stage measurable in 7d window
opportunities.problem: Growth metrics counted probe events; orchestrator used wrong rate field names.
opportunities.hypothesis: Aligned getFunnelCounts + orchestrator brief + ship-verify exposes real leak within 48h.
opportunities.baseline: Growth vs conversion funnel mismatch on instant_matches_viewed
opportunities.target: All north_star funnel_stages emit events with variant attribution
opportunities.next_step: Monitor agents:ship-verify daily; review orchestrator weakest_stage after deploy.

opportunities.title: Visitor → signup → use → paid conversion loop
opportunities.problem: 0 pricing_viewed in 7d; 1 total signup; monetization path unproven.
opportunities.hypothesis: Daily autopilot + pricing bridge from preview drives first pricing A/B winner.
opportunities.target: Measurable preview→signup→checkout funnel; first pricing A/B winner
opportunities.next_step: pricing_strip_viewed + pricing_viewed on click shipped on preview sticky bar. Monitor strip→click rate in conversion:funnel.
